name: Oringinal "Philly" Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup Graham cracker crumbs and 3 tablespoons melted margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine 24 ounces cream cheese, softened, with 3/4 cup sugar, 5 tablespoons lemon juice, 1 1/2 teaspoons grated lemon peel, and 1 teaspoon vanilla. Mix until well blended.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; fold into cream cheese mixture.
6. Pour filling over crust.
7. Bake at 300 degrees F for 45 minutes.
8. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill.
9. Top with cherry pie filling or fresh fruit, if desired.
